name: Guacamole Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine avocado, diced tomato, onion, salt, chili powder (to taste), red pepper flakes, and lemon juice in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Shape the ground beef into 4 patties.
3. Grill the patties over medium hot coals for about 5 minutes on each side until they reach your desired level of doneness.
4. Place each patty on half of a toasted English muffin.
5. Top each patty with some guacamole mixture and place the other half of the muffin on top.
6. Serve with corn chips and remaining guacamole on the side.
